stories.title: Source: Oilers fire Knoblauch after two Cup Finals...
stories.summary: Despite back-to-back Stanley Cup Final appearances in 2024 and 2025 and with an extension that had not yet begun, Oilers coach Kris Knoblauch has been fired, sources confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Source: Nabers had 'cleanup,' hopeful for Week 1
stories.summary: Malik Nabers underwent a second procedure on his right knee earlier this offseason and the Giants remain hopeful the wide receiver will be ready for Week 1, a source confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Higgo late to tee time, gets 2-shot penalty at PGA...
stories.summary: Garrick Higgo was penalized two strokes for being late to his Thursday morning tee time in the first round of the 108th PGA Championship.

stories.title: NBA lands on '3-2-1 lottery' proposal, per Silver
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver confirmed on Stephen A. Smith's radio show Wednesday that the NBA has landed on a proposal to present to the league's board of governors later this month to revamp the league's draft lottery in an attempt to curb tanking.

stories.title: Avs storm back from down 3-0, make West finals
stories.summary: Trailing 3-0 midway through the second period, the Avs tied it late in regulation before Brett Kulak capped the rally in overtime to put Colorado in the Western Conference finals with a 4-3 win over the Wild.
